name: issue-flow
description: Issue-driven development orchestrator packaged as a reusable Codex plugin bundle.

interface.shortDescription: Run issue-driven development from one Codex plugin entrypoint.
interface.longDescription: Issue Flow bundles workflow skills and hooks into a Codex-friendly plugin package. It drives brainstorming, issue creation, planning, implementation, verification, commit, PR, and finish steps from a single orchestrator skill.
defaultPrompt: Use issue-flow to turn this requirement into an issue and plan.
Resume the current issue-flow session in this worktree.
